title: HRIS Project Mgr - Workday - 2 years contract @ West
description:
Our client is actively searching for a HRIS Project Manager - Workday (2yrs contract) to join their team!

If you are a dynamic individual seeking a new career opportunity, read further!

The HRIS Project Manager will be responsible for overseeing the administration, optimization, and continuous enhancement of the University’s Human Resource Information Systems (HRIS), with a primary focus on Workday. This role ensures the accuracy, security, and functionality of HR data, streamlines HR processes, and provides user support and training

The responsibilities of this role are:

System Administration & Business Process Enhancement

  • Manage system administration and strengthen the core functionality of the HRIS.
  • Lead initiatives to gather user requirements, propose system designs, and conduct solution testing.
  • Build strong relationships with key stakeholders to understand and address business needs.
  • Configure business processes within Workday based on organizational requirements.
  • Conduct impact analyses for application upgrades and manage upgrade implementation effectively.

Operational Support

  • Deliver comprehensive operational support for Workday, including event and incident management, troubleshooting, and resolution of break/fix scenarios.
  • Rescind, correct, and advance workflows or transactions as required to maintain system integrity.

The ideal candidate will need to have the following qualities and experience:

  • Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.
  • 6-8 years of relevant experience in HR technology
  • In-depth knowledge on HRIS systems, especially in Workday with strong functional and technical skills in Core HR, Recruitment, Learning, Performance Management and Time and Attendance
  • Proven experience managing full project life cycles; demonstrated ability to handle multiple projects concurrently while meeting deadlines and maintaining quality outcomes
  • Possess good experience in system implementation roles

An exciting career awaits the right candidate! Click "Quick Apply" to register your interest now.

All applicants' CV will be treated with the strictest confidentiality. We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
CTES CONSULTING PTE. LTD.

Our Recruitment Consultants are equipped with extensive recruitment and industry expertise in their

areas of specialisation.

 

The experience combined with their commitment to establish a deep understanding of our client and

their business priorities enable CTES to deliver value far beyond the service provided by traditional

search firms.

 

We provide an impeccable match. At CTES, we believe in providing a seamless match between

candidate and client. We deem it our responsibility to thoroughly understand our client's needs, and to

obtain in-depth knowledge of the job requirements and the culture of the client's organization. This

enables us to provide suitable and proficient candidates to our clients.

 

By ensuring a close match between the candidate and position, we are able to foster a win-win

situation, for both our clients and our candidates.

 

CTES aims to be an organisation renowned throughout the Asia-Pacific region, integral to both

employers and career seekers. We hope to become the preferred HR and career consultants for our

clients and candidates respectively.
